data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario of group size changes after booking.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any specific tests or validations related to the scenario of group size changes after booking. While there are successful prior steps related to bookings, none of them directly address the expected outcome of the exploratory step, which is to confirm the behavior of the system when group sizes change. Therefore, the lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive verdict regarding the validation of this scenario.
gaps: No evidence of scenario behavior when group size changes after booking.
